headline: GoDaddy’s Alexandra Rosen Reveals Small Business Outlook for 2026
summary: GoDaddy’s Alexandra Rosen joins Kristen Scholer on NYSE Live to discuss the 2026 business outlook

headline: Is GoDaddy (GDDY) Pricing Look Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether GoDaddy's current share price matches its underlying business value, you are not alone. This article is built to help you weigh that up clearly. GoDaddy's shares last closed at US$93.95, with returns of 7.8% over the past week, a 3.4% decline over 30 days, a 20.7% decline year to date and a 46.4% decline over the past year. This compares with gains of 29.8% over 3 years and 29.7% over 5 years. Recent coverage of GoDaddy has focused on its position as a major...
